sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64039" key="lugo/desmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῠγό-δεσμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n64039.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bound with willow-twigs</tr_>, epith. of Artemis, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:16:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.16.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
